overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing an armored character walking through a barren desert landscape at night. The character steadily approaches a distant smoke plume rising from the sandy terrain, passing scattered rock formations in an atmospheric, low-light environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: open desert wasteland with scattered boulders

agents.ego_description: armored character walking steadily through the desert toward a distant smoke plume on the horizon

entered.detail: cluster of dark boulders scattered on the right side of the desert plain
small rock formations spread across the left side of the terrain
rising column of smoke or dust visible in the distant center of the frame
sandy desert ground with subtle ripples and texture

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark desert landscape at night. The camera follows an armored character walking forward through sandy terrain. Large rock clusters are visible in the distance on both sides, while a mysterious smoke plume rises far ahead on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert passage with large rock formation

events.description: character passes the large rock formation on the right side

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk forward, passing the large rock outcropping on the right while maintaining course toward the smoke

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking through the desert, passing a prominent rock formation on the right. The smoke plume ahead grows slightly larger in the frame as the distance closes. The scattered rocks on the left shift from distant background elements to mid-ground features.

agents.ego_description: approaching the smoke plume which now shows more detail and particle effects rising from the ground

segments.scene_description: In the final segment, the character continues the approach toward the smoke source. The plume is now much closer and more detailed, appearing to emanate from a specific point on the desert floor. The scattered rocks on the left continue to pass by as the character maintains a steady walking pace through the desolate landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dark, desolate desert as an armored character steadily closes the distance toward a mysterious smoke plume. It begins with the character walking through sandy terrain under a night sky, with large rock clusters framing the horizon and the plume appearing as a distant speck. As the character advances, the scene shifts to bring a prominent rock formation on the right into closer view while the scattered stones on the left move from the background into the mid-ground. The camera continues its forward trajectory, causing the smoke plume to grow larger and more detailed in the frame. Finally, the character maintains a steady pace through the barren landscape as the plume reveals itself to be emanating from a specific point on the desert floor.
